---
title: "Practical-Exercise"
format: html
---

### Data Analysis

Load dataset

```{r}
# Load dataset
library(readxl)
hdss <- read_excel("data/sample_hdss.xlsx")

# Show summary
summary(hdss$Age)
```

Load dataset - displaying only the results.

```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(readxl)

# Load dataset
hdss <- read_excel("data/sample_hdss.xlsx")

# Show summary of Age column
summary(hdss$Age)
# Sex distribution
table(hdss$gender)
```

### Text and Images

You can add text here just like a word processor.

## Equations

The equation is $E = mc^2$. Mix of text and Math as, the mean is $\bar{x} = `r mean(c(1,2,3))`$.
